title: Navaris Plastic Storage Box - Stackable Organizer Case with Adjustable and Removable Divider Compartment for Tools, Small Items, Jewelry - 2 Boxes
features: MASTER ORGANIZER: Keep all your DIY accessories and tools handy and tidy with the Navaris plastic storage box. Choose the size that suits you according to your needs - for both beginners and professionals.

TAILOR MADE: The compartments can be adjusted in size to accommodate larger accessories such as a screwdriver, wrench, etc. The dividers are also removable to leave ample space. The boxes are designed for easy storage of tools and other small items.

DIMENSIONS: There are three sizes to choose from. Dimensions of singular box: 19 x 15 x 4 cm | Dimensions of 2 stackable boxes: 37.5 x 29 x 13.4 cm | Dimensions of 3 stackable boxes: 31.5 x 22.5 x 19.8 cm.

SECURE CLOSURE: There are 4 hooks on the front and sides that provide an excellent top lid lock and prevent any pieces from falling out. Your tools and other items are securely held in place inside the case.
SOLID & DURABLE: Thanks to the sturdy plastic and the built-in handle you can easily transport it to the toolshed or workshop.
description: Product Description Keep all your tools and small accessories handy and tidy with the Navaris plastic storage box. With removable dividers and choices of stackable organizers, you'll easily find the tools that you need. Delivery Scope 2x plastic storage boxes Technical Details Material: plastic Dimensions: 14.8 x 11.4 x 5.3 inches (37.5 x 29 x 13.4 cm) LATCHES There are 4 clip hooks that will keep the storage case securely closed so that the case cannot fall open during transport. ADJUSTABLE DIVIDERS The dividers can be removed and put in place so that you can choose the right size for your different tools. HANDLE Thanks to the sturdy plastic and the built-in handle you can easily transport it to the tool shed or workshop. Navaris Find more stylish and useful products in our Brand Store!
